metadata.description: Community harness kit for Claude Code — multi-agent orchestration with 7 patterns, 8 teams, built-in operations tooling

plugins.name: dev-team
plugins.description: Full feature development pipeline: planner -> FE+BE parallel -> reviewer -> QA

plugins.name: review-team
plugins.description: Multi-stage code review: 3 parallel screeners (correctness/security/perf) -> moderator -> judge with SARIF output

plugins.name: fe-team
plugins.description: Frontend expert pool + Reflection: architect, implementer, reflector, styler, perf, tester for React/Next.js

plugins.name: be-team
plugins.description: Backend expert pool + Reflection: architect, implementer, reflector, validator, resilience, provider, security, tester for Hono/Express

plugins.name: explore-team
plugins.description: Hierarchical codebase exploration: scout(opus) -> hypothesizer -> evidence -> synthesizer, strictly read-only

plugins.name: research-team
plugins.description: Blackboard-pattern research: planner -> crawler -> reader -> synthesizer for long-running web/doc research tasks

plugins.name: debate-team
plugins.description: Adversarial debate for contested decisions: advocate-a + advocate-b + devils-advocate -> judge

plugins.name: ops-team
plugins.description: Release pipeline, CI auto-fix watcher, zombie-collector, operational CLAUDE.md rules, and push hooks
